description: Account Backend Tenant Isolation & Security. (1) CRITICAL: filterOptions uses raw ctx.prisma instead of prismaWithTenant for user lookup — tenant data leak (B-01, account.router.ts:445). (2) PrismaAccountRepository has NO tenantId filter on any method — single-layer defense (B-02). (3) existsByName blocks same name across all tenants — should be per-tenant (B-03). (4) sortBy parameter unsanitized — potential Prisma orderBy injection (B-04). (5) TOCTOU window in update/delete without transaction (B-05). (6) Zero audit logging on all account mutations (B-07). Audit: docs/audit/account-detail-wiring-audit.md sections 11-12.

wiring_complete.target: Zero cross-tenant data leaks; audit log entries for all mutations

validations.name: Task completion verification
validations.notes: Task marked as completed in Sprint_plan.csv

notes: Account domain wiring audit finding. See docs/audit/account-detail-wiring-audit.md.
